meaning: n.妇女联谊会,女学生联谊会
examples: Victoria, Michelle, and Erin are sorority sisters.
I missed out on all those things like joining a sorority.
Join a club, or a fraternity or sorority, or the student council.
He earned money washing dishes at a sorority house and unloading freight at the railroad station.
Ted Bundy: He was convicted of killing sorority sisters in Florida and put to death.
